resolvedIssues.title: Level-3 caster spell advancement now owns and prepares a complete legal list
resolvedIssues.detail: Reviewed advancement added canonical Cleric choices and two Wizard spellbook spells per Wizard level, retained exact item revisions and SRD provenance, and left both level-3 prepared lists at 6/6 with no follow-up preparation mutation.
